title: cyclamen persicum var. vernale
intro: Cyclamen persicum var. vernale, also known as the florist's cyclamen or winter cyclamen, is a flowering perennial plant that belongs to the primrose family (Primulaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its leaves and roots possessing medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of cyclamen persicum var. vernale include its potential to reduce fever, ease pain, and treat digestive issues, among other ailments. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
